changes.comment: Add the `json-schema-builder` packlet (exported as the `JsonSchema` namespace): typed JSON Schema for the LLM-tool subset. Seven factories (`string`, `number`, `integer`, `boolean`, `enumOf`, `array`, `object`) plus the `optional` modifier return `ISchemaValidator<T>` instances that extend `Validator<T>` — the schema value IS the validator. `JsonSchema.Static<typeof schema>` derives the TypeScript type automatically (no caller-supplied `T`). `schema.toJson()` emits the draft-07 wire schema; `fromJson` parses a raw `JsonObject` (e.g. an MCP-discovered schema) into an opaque `ISchemaValidator<JsonValue>`, failing on out-of-subset structural keywords. Strictly additive — no existing export changed.
